registration_requirements.description: Conditions that must be satisfied for template registration

template_json.description: Template metadata file must exist and be valid

io_schema.description: Input/output port definitions must be complete
requirements: Each port must have a shape from primitives or registered types
Optional ports may specify default value
No 'any' type allowed, use explicit union if needed

implementation.description: At least one implementation must exist
requirements: implementations field must not be empty
For each implementation: kind, language, and code_file must be specified
code_file must exist in implementations/<language>/ directory
fixed_cases must contain at least one happy_path
generated_rules must specify test generation strategy

boundary.description: Edge cases (empty strings, zero values, etc.)

generated_rules.description: Rules for automatic test case generation

boundary.description: Generate boundary values for constrained ports
examples: min/max values, empty collections, boundary strings

null_input.description: Test null values for required ports

type_error.description: Test wrong shape values for each port
type_error.expected: Should fail validation or coerce if unsafe

missing_port.description: Omit each required port one at a time

id.uniqueness: Must be unique across all templates

tags.description: Semantic tags for search and discovery

function_signature.description: All implementations must follow standard signature
function_signature.inputs: Dictionary mapping port names to values
function_signature.outputs: Dictionary mapping output port names to values

error_handling.format: Return dict with 'error' key on failure

side_effects.external_calls: Allowed but should be documented and tested
